## Description

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] The build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] I have run linting (`npm run lint`) with no errors
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have added i18n keys for any new UI strings (`en.json`, `de.json`, `nb.json`, `nn.json`, `sv.json`, `zh.json`)
- [ ] If this PR modifies critical flows (OAuth, drag-drop, modals), I have verified E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e:ui`)
- [ ] If adding new card components, they are wrapped with `React.memo()` for performance
- [ ] If this is a release/update PR, `npm run release:check` passes and versions/changelogs are synced

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Before / After screenshots for UI changes.
